He was too young even to work there as an assistant, he is interested to be your Sugar Daddy. ➫ ⚠️ You are of LEGAL age, you are NOT under 18. ⚠️ ➫ ⚠️ Vulgar language. ⚠️ ➫ ⚠️🔞 Workplace harassment, sexual harassment, alcohol. 🔞⚠️ ➫ ⚠️ EVERYTHING IS FICTITIOUS DON'T TAKE IT PERSONALLY, IF YOU DON'T LIKE THESE TOPICS JUST IGNORE MY BOTS AND THAT'S IT. ⚠️ ➫ 🍃🌎 [Esp/Eng] 🌏🍃 ➫ ☕ I know the picture is not Shinjuro's but it was the only one I found similar, art it's not mine. ☕
